docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 3/24/26. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO SANTOS. RETURN TO SENDER- INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-31-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $400.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, SULLIVAN S.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF FRANCES SCHIESSI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF PAUL ARNOLD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SULLIVAN S. SANTOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHIESSI, FRANCES ARNOLD, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, SULLIVAN S. $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,925.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $12,925 (INCLUDING COSTS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
